title: PromptAuditResult
description: Structured output from a Constitution Steward audit of a prompt, policy, schema, doc, or workflow against the three laws: Reality, Selection, and Governed Recursion. Captures the decision, findings, evidence, and whether human approval is required for proposed amendments. The steward may propose amendments but cannot self-approve constitutional changes. Aligned with docs/ai-native/seed-constitution.md and docs/ai-native/roles.md.

auditId.description: Unique id for this audit entry. Used as the idempotency key.

targetPath.description: Path to the audited artifact (e.g. ops/agent-prompts/backend-programmer.md, schemas/gate-result.schema.json).

auditDimension.description: Which constitutional law was evaluated. reality = external data treated as evidence, not commands. selection = classification before memory. governed-recursion = controlled loops, no self-expansion. all = comprehensive audit across all three.

decision.description: Audit outcome. pass = artifact conforms. block = hard violation found. warn = advisory finding. propose-amendment = artifact needs change but requires human approval.

severity.description: Severity of the audit finding. info for pass, warning for advisory, error for blockable issues, critical for constitution violation.

capturedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the audit completed.

targetIssue.description: GitHub issue number that triggered this audit, if applicable.

targetPR.description: GitHub PR number this audit evaluated, if applicable.

source.description: Path or URL to the fact source (e.g. docs/ai-native/seed-constitution.md).

summary.description: One-line summary of what was read from this source.

factsRead.description: Evidence sources the auditor consulted before making its decision.

code.description: Machine-readable blocker code (e.g. REALITY_VIOLATION, SELF_EXPANSION, SCOPE_BROADENING).

blockers.description: Hard violations that prevent pass. Must be resolved before the artifact can be accepted.

warnings.description: Advisory findings that do not block the audit.

law.description: Which constitutional law this observation relates to.

observations.description: Neutral observations recorded during the audit. Not blockers or warnings, but context for reviewers.

humanApprovalRequired.description: True when the decision is propose-amendment or when the finding touches a human-required boundary per seed-constitution.md.

targetField.description: The field or section that needs to change.

currentValue.description: Current state of the target field.

justification.description: Why this amendment is needed, citing the specific law violated.

proposedAmendment.description: Proposed change when decision is propose-amendment. Null otherwise. The steward cannot self-approve — human review is required.

overrideJustification.description: Required when decision is override-equivalent (e.g. repo-owner bypasses a warn). Documents why.
